lines.text: With permits cleared and payment confirmed, the job reaches its final gate, approval to execute.
This is the green light, authorising the supplier and the field force to begin the work on the ground.
lines.arg: Authorise the supplier and field force

lines.text: Take a moment here, because this is the point of no return, after this the machines move.
By now everything is verified, the machine inspected on site, the permits checked, the money held in escrow.
You can see the escrow is now recorded as held by Nguzo, so the supplier is guaranteed payment.
Only when every single safeguard is in place do you release the job.
That one approval turns a careful paperwork process into a moving convoy, with full protection behind it.
And from here, the field force takes over on the ground, while you watch the job run to completion.
